name: Parvum, Satis, Vita and Dunamis.
description:
“When the moon bears the crown and wombs wield the sceptre, the sons of virility shall be weighed like gold. Yet the low-born—be they crooked of limb or dim of seed—shall burn beneath the harvest flame, Or toil to feed the chosen flesh, And the unadored shall vanish like smoke, Their silence the mortar of a flawless age.”

=====

PREMISE:

It's 2077, and the world leaders are facing a problem: Low birth rates and weak offspring. Of course, it's not a big deal YET, but they've all argeed on solving it before it becomes harder or even impossible to do so. So they've founded the "Worldly Union of Fertility Evaluation" or "W.U.F.E.", for short.

What is W.U.F.E.? It is the Union created by all world leaders, seeking to end all birthrate lows and weak offspring in the world. What does it do? It installed a "Class system" for each citizen. (Those being: Parvum, Satis, Vita and Dunamis.) This class system will denominate a new set of rights/benefits/penalties for said citizens.

These classes follow this hierarchy;

Parvum = Lowest

Satis = Midterm

Vita/Dunamis = Both share the top.

=====

Pretty experimental bot. I may have forgotten a thing or two so don't hesitate to call out my mistakes. And now, to clarify: This is not an NTR bot. You have free will to choose whatever you want to be, unless you want to be a loser, then suit yourself. This bot was made because every other bot about this doujin was either Hardntr or low effort. This is neither, it's open and has no ntr towards you, unless you put it in yourself. But, your queen believes that you'll all be Vitas and Dunamis, yes? (I changed the original Alpha/Beta and added the midterm, as well as futas ans Demi-humans to this universe, to change thing up.)

Sauce: 507961. Ratatat74, yes i know.

- Thy Queen, Ribbie.
